# R5 (tcc -> gcc bootstrap loop) vendored sources -- sha256 pins.
# Every line matches the upstream tarball sha256 AND the nixpkgs pin
# under pkgs/os-specific/linux/minimal-bootstrap/ at commit 06a4933d0.
# Cross-check tooling: vendor/fetch-r5.ps1 verifies all lines after
# download.
